judgment.summary: Strong gross margins and a robust cash position are countered by significant revenue declines and sharply negative growth projections.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS was -1.49 vs an estimate of 0.04 (miss), with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Gross margin 85.5% — indicates high efficiency in core service delivery.
Total cash $10.44B — provides a significant liquidity cushion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $2.41B — shows strong ability to generate cash.
Current ratio 2.14 — suggests healthy short-term liquidity.
negatives: Revenue growth -30.8% — shows a significant year-over-year decline.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter and fiscal year are -97.1% and -72.5% — indicates massive projected contraction.
Last reported EPS -1.49 vs estimate 0.04 — represents a significant earnings miss.
Beta 3.38 — implies extremely high price volatility.

news.paragraph: Coinbase is navigating crypto market headwinds through product diversification and AI strategies while simultaneously undergoing a 14% reduction in its workforce. Traders should weigh these operational restructuring efforts and broader crypto market trends when evaluating potential volatility.
